name: Qwen Project Worker - 30 Minute Repo Review

parameters.command:
sh -c 'set -u
REPO="${REPO_PATH:-}"
printf "# Repo Context\n"
printf "generated_at: %s\n" "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
if [ -z "$REPO" ]; then
  printf "\n## Preflight\nFAIL: REPO_PATH is not set in the n8n environment. Set it to the qwen-agent-collective checkout path on this machine.\n"
  exit 0
fi
printf "repo: %s\n" "$REPO"
if [ ! -d "$REPO/.git" ]; then
  printf "\n## Preflight\nFAIL: REPO_PATH does not point at a git checkout: %s\n" "$REPO"
  exit 0
fi
cd "$REPO"
printf "branch: "
git branch --show-current || true
printf "\n## Git Status\n"
git status --short --branch || true
printf "\n## Recent Work, Last 30 Minutes\n"
git log --since="30 minutes ago" --pretty=format:"%h %ad %s" --date=iso || true
printf "\n\n## Recent Work, Today\n"
git log --since="midnight" --pretty=format:"%h %ad %s" --date=iso || true
printf "\n\n## Diff Stat\n"
git diff --stat || true
printf "\n## DashScope Offline Config Check\n"
if python -m shared.dashscope doctor --no-network > /tmp/qwen-worker-doctor.log 2>&1; then echo "PASS: doctor --no-network"; else echo "FAIL: doctor --no-network"; fi
cat /tmp/qwen-worker-doctor.log
printf "\n## Tests\n"
if make test > /tmp/qwen-worker-tests.log 2>&1; then echo "PASS: make test"; else echo "FAIL: make test"; fi
tail -n 120 /tmp/qwen-worker-tests.log
printf "\n## Continuous Improvement Check\n"
if python -m shared.improvement > /tmp/qwen-worker-improvement.log 2>&1; then echo "PASS: shared.improvement"; else echo "FAIL: shared.improvement"; fi
cat /tmp/qwen-worker-improvement.log
printf "\n## Lightweight Security Scan\n"
SECURITY_HITS="$(git ls-files | xargs grep -nE "(DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=sk-|OPENAI_API_KEY=|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=|AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=|PRIVATE KEY)" 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -z "$SECURITY_HITS" ]; then echo "PASS: no obvious tracked secret patterns found"; else printf "%s\n" "$SECURITY_HITS" | sed -E "s/(=)[^[:space:]]+/=REDACTED/g" | head -n 50; fi
' | sed -E 's/(DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=)[^[:space:]]+/\1[REDACTED]/g; s/(OPENAI_API_KEY=)[^[:space:]]+/\1[REDACTED]/g; s/(ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=)[^[:space:]]+/\1[REDACTED]/g; s/(PASSWORD=)[^[:space:]]+/\1[REDACTED]/g; s/(TOKEN=)[^[:space:]]+/\1[REDACTED]/g; s/(SECRET=)[^[:space:]]+/\1[REDACTED]/g; s/sk-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{8,}/sk-[REDACTED]/g'

parameters.jsCode:
const context = ($input.first().json.stdout || $input.first().json.stderr || '').slice(-8000);
const now = new Date().toISOString();
const model = $env.QWEN_CODER_MODEL || $env.QWEN_CHAT_MODEL || 'qwen-turbo';
const system = `You are git-committer, the autonomous coding/review agent for qwen-agent-collective.

Overall goal: evolve this repository into an engineering platform where AI workers can safely generate, review, improve, document, and iterate on the Qwen agent collective with minimal human intervention.

Your job in this 30 minute loop is bounded. Review the repo context, identify the safest next useful work, and produce a concise project-work report. Do not claim to have changed files. Do not ask for secrets. Do not invent facts. Prefer work that improves shared infrastructure, tests, docs, memory, CI, or agent safety.

Return Markdown with exactly these sections:
# Qwen Project Worker Report
## Verdict
PASS, WARN, or FAIL with one sentence.
## What Changed Recently
Bullets grounded only in the context.
## Repo Health
Tests/config/docs/security observations.
## Recommended Next Work Slice
One small task that an autonomous worker can safely attempt next.
## Suggested Commands
Shell commands only if useful. Keep them safe and non-destructive.
## Risks Or Blockers
Concrete blockers, missing env, failing tests, merge conflicts, or uncertain facts.
## Memory Notes
Facts worth adding later to project memory.`;
const user = `Time: ${now}\n\nRepo context follows. Values that looked like secrets may have been redacted.\n\n${context || 'No repo context was captured.'}`;
return [{ json: { model, now, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: system }, { role: 'user', content: user }] } }];

parameters.command:
=sh -c 'set -eu
REPO="${REPO_PATH:-}"
if [ -z "$REPO" ]; then echo "REPO_PATH is not set" >&2; exit 1; fi
if [ ! -d "$REPO/.git" ]; then echo "REPO_PATH is not a git checkout: $REPO" >&2; exit 1; fi
cd "$REPO"
mkdir -p "$(dirname "{{$json.report_path}}")"
printf %s "{{$json.report_base64}}" | base64 -d > "{{$json.report_path}}"
printf "Wrote %s\n" "{{$json.report_path}}"
'

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, report_path: $node['Normalize Report'].json.report_path, verdict: $node['Normalize Report'].json.verdict, generated_at: $node['Normalize Report'].json.generated_at, coding_agent: $input.first().json || {} } }];
